game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **幻境双生：地图编辑器模式开放 (Mirage Memorial: Map Editor Mode Open):** 幻境双生 is a pixel-art platform puzzle game where players control the character Retna using an on-screen virtual joystick for left/right movement and a dedicated jump button. The core mechanic involves instantly switching between two parallel dimensions, the "Normal World" and the "Inner World," via a tap-activated UI button, where the environment's layout, obstacles, and interactive elements differ between worlds. Actions performed in one world, such as moving a block or activating a switch, directly influence the state or accessibility of areas in the other, requiring players to strategically alternate worlds to navigate paths and solve environmental puzzles. Progression occurs across 5 story chapters containing 32 main levels and 8 challenge levels, with success defined by reaching an exit point or collecting all memory fragments (crystals) within a level, while failure results from falling into hazards or taking damage. The game also features a "Map Editor Mode" allowing players to design and share custom levels, and difficulty scales through increasingly intricate dual-world interactions and multi-step puzzle solutions.
game_info.description: Navigate through dual-world puzzles in Mirage Memorial! Control Retna, a character trapped between the Normal World and Inner World. Switch between dimensions to manipulate the environment—move blocks, activate switches, and open pathways. Each world affects the other, so think strategically! Collect all memory crystals and reach the exit to complete each level. Features a map editor to design your own mind-bending puzzles.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move Retna left or right
Space: Jump
Z: Switch between Normal World (blue) and Inner World (purple)
Shift: Interact with blocks and switches
Enter: Start the game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement mechanics and world-switching functionality. Validates that the player can move left/right, jump, and switch between dimensions without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Execute a series of movements in both worlds, including jumps and dimension switches. Test collision detection with platforms and walls in both dimensions.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player position updates correctly, dimension switching works instantly, and collisions are properly detected in both worlds. No errors or glitches occur during transitions.

TEST_1.expected: Player position updates correctly, dimension switching works instantly, and collisions are properly detected in both worlds. No errors or glitches occur during transitions.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing the complete win condition by solving a puzzle level. This validates that players can interact with game objects, collect crystals, and reach the exit successfully.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate through the level using optimal pathfinding. Switch dimensions strategically to move blocks and activate switches. Collect all memory crystals and reach the exit portal.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully collect all crystals, solve the puzzle by manipulating both worlds, reach the exit, and trigger GAME_OVER_WIN state. Score reflects collected items and completion.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing block interaction mechanics across dimensions. Validates that pushing blocks in one world affects accessibility in the other world.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Push movable blocks in the Normal World, then switch to Inner World to verify the block's position is maintained. Use blocks to create platforms or fill gaps.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Blocks maintain position across world switches. Player can successfully push blocks and use them to navigate previously inaccessible areas.
TEST_3.description: Testing block interaction mechanics across dimensions. Validates that pushing blocks in one world affects accessibility in the other world.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing switch and door mechanics. Validates that activating switches in one world opens doors or changes the environment in the corresponding location of the other world.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Locate switches and activate them using the Shift key. Switch dimensions to verify doors open or platforms appear at the corresponding location.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Switches successfully toggle door states across dimensions. The environment changes persist and allow progression through the level.
